summary: Mixed reception – a brief enthusiastic note alongside criticism of a jarring slide on Minglewood Blues, with no clear recording details.
review: One reviewer gave a terse five‑star endorsement, while another highlighted an odd, jarring slide squeal during Minglewood Blues that drew a crowd reaction, suggesting a rough guitar moment. No concrete information about the source or sonic clarity is provided, leaving the technical quality uncertain.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with divergent opinions; a single positive comment gives little insight, while the negative review points to a performance flaw. Lack of recording details limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on soundboard or audience clarity; only an odd slide squeal is mentioned, which appears to be a performance issue rather than a recording flaw.
